2606.11182.title: EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents
2606.11182.paper_summary: In this paper, we propose EEVEE, the first multi-dataset test-time prompt learning framework for LLM agents, enabling test-time prompt learning under real-world task streams. Existing methods are largely designed for single-dataset settings, while real-world applications require models to handle heterogeneous input streams drawn from multiple datasets, domains, and task distributions, limiting their practical applicability. To mitigate cross-dataset interference, EEVEE introduces a router that partitions incoming inputs into task clusters and assigns them to suitable prompt configurations. This design is optimized via a router-prompt co-evolution strategy, which employs interleaved router and prompt learning phases to address their mutual dependency. Experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that the framework improves robustness under heterogeneous data streams while maintaining single-benchmark learning capability and efficiency. Specifically, EEVEE improves average multi-benchmark scores by 10.38 and 24.32 points over Qwen3-4B-Instruct and DeepSeek-V3.2, surpassing SOTA methods GEPA and ACE by up to 37.2% and 48.2%.
2606.11182.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了EEVEE，首個針對LLM代理的多數據集測試時提示學習框架，使得在現實世界任務流中進行測試時提示學習成為可能。現有的方法主要是為單一數據集設計的，而現實世界的應用需要模型處理來自多個數據集、領域和任務分佈的異質輸入流，這限制了它們的實際應用性。為了減輕跨數據集的干擾，EEVEE引入了一個路由器，將進來的輸入劃分為任務集群並將其分配給合適的提示配置。這一設計通過路由器-提示共同演化策略進行優化，該策略採用了交錯的路由器和提示學習階段，以解決它們之間的相互依賴性。在多個數據集上的實驗表明，該框架在異質數據流中提高了穩健性，同時保持了單一基準學習能力和效率。具體而言，EEVEE在Qwen3-4B-Instruct和DeepSeek-V3.2上分別提高了平均多基準分數10.38和24.32分，超越了SOTA方法GEPA和ACE，增幅達到37.2%和48.2%。
2606.11182.author: Weixian Xu et.al.
2606.11182.authors: Weixian Xu, Shilong Liu, Mengdi Wang
